name: First Bancorp, Inc /ME/
summary: The First Bancorp, Inc. (FNLC) is a Maine-based bank holding company operating through its subsidiary, First National Bank. The company provides banking products and services including deposit accounts, loans, Wealth Management, and Investment Services. It is subject to federal and state financial institution regulations and lists its stock on Nasdaq.

products.name: Wealth Management
products.description: Wealth management services offered to clients with referral fee incentives for qualified referrals.

products.name: Investment Services
products.description: Investment services offered to clients with referral fee incentives for qualified referrals.

products.name: First National Bank Savings and Investment Plan
products.description: Employee savings and investment plan involving Company stock transactions.

products.name: Employee and Director Stock Purchase Program
products.description: Program allowing employees and directors to purchase Company stock.

products.name: Long-Term Equity Incentive Plan
products.description: Long-term equity incentive plan for employees and directors involving Company stock.

products.name: Dividend Reinvestment Plan
products.description: Plan allowing shareholders to reinvest dividends into Company stock.
